## Description

Describe the problem clearly.

## Reproduction

```php
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

// Minimal code that reproduces the issue.

```

## Expected behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

Describe what happened instead.
